creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 234947
Screen recording (looping animated GIF)

Steps: 

1. triple-click to select a line
2. observe the selection, one line
3. new inline comment

Expected: 

4. a comment relating to one line

Actual result: 

4. a comment relating to two lines. 

Context
=======

✩ Phacility is Winding Down Operations
<https://admin.phacility.com/phame/post/view/11/phacility_is_winding_down_operations/>

… if this bug is upstream, I guess that there'll be no fix.
